summary: Major update testing - Redesigned homepage with 10 new features. All backend tests passed (17/17). All frontend tests passed. Homepage now has: map, offers section, category grid (3 columns), events section, favorites section, browse all button. Category list view with search works. Open/Closed badges, favorites, distance sorting all functional.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for new features
seed_data_creation: Test offer created: 'TEST Admin Offer' with 15% discount. Test event created. Test menu item created: 'TEST Ćevapi' - 8.50 KM. Test business account created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major update with redesigned homepage fully functional. Homepage sections: map (top), offers (horizontal scroll), categories (3-column grid), events (cards), favorites (appears after toggling), browse all button. Clicking category or search opens filtered list view with search input. All backend endpoints working: is_open field, distance sorting, offers with location_name enrichment, events, analytics tracking, business accounts, business offers/menu.

is_open_field.test_locations_have_is_open_field: ✓ GET /api/locations returns is_open field (boolean) for all 16 locations

distance_sorting.test_distance_sorting_with_coords: ✓ GET /api/locations?lat=44.88&lng=18.43&sort=distance returns locations sorted by distance (ascending)
distance_sorting.test_distance_without_sort_param: ✓ Distance field NOT present without sort=distance (correct behavior)

offers.test_get_all_offers: ✓ GET /api/offers returns offers with location_name enrichment (3 offers found)
offers.test_get_location_offers: ✓ GET /api/locations/{id}/offers returns offers for specific location

events.test_get_events: ✓ GET /api/events returns upcoming events (1 event found)

business_accounts.test_create_business_account_with_auth: ✓ POST /api/admin/business-accounts creates business account with admin auth

business_offers.test_create_business_offer_with_admin_au: ✓ POST /api/business/offers creates offer with admin auth

business_menu.test_create_menu_item_with_admin_auth: ✓ POST /api/business/menu creates menu item with admin auth

category_list_view.category_click_opens_list: ✓ Clicking category grid item opens filtered list view
category_list_view.location_cards: ✓ Location cards displayed (3 restaurants in filtered view, 16 in all)

location_card_features.open_closed_badge: ✓ Open/Closed badge visible on all cards ('Otvoreno' in green)

location_card_features.heart_icon: ✓ Heart icon (favorite toggle) visible on cards
location_card_features.distance_display: ⚠ Distance not shown (location permission not granted in test environment)

browse_all_functionality.button_click: ✓ Browse all button opens full location list

map_functionality.map_controls: ✓ Map control buttons visible (about, admin, locate)

backend_frontend_integration.offers_fetch: ✓ Frontend fetches offers from GET /api/offers on page load

backend_frontend_integration.events_fetch: ✓ Frontend fetches events from GET /api/events on page load
backend_frontend_integration.is_open_display: ✓ Frontend displays is_open status from backend
backend_frontend_integration.category_filter: ✓ Frontend filters locations by category ID

backend_endpoints.GET_api_locations_is_open: ✓ Working - Returns is_open field (boolean) for all locations

backend_endpoints.POST_api_locations_id_track_action: ✓ Working - Tracks nav_clicks and call_clicks analytics

backend_endpoints.POST_api_business_menu: ✓ Working - Creates menu item (business/admin auth required)

is_open_function.logic: ✓ Parses working_hours string, compares with current time in CET timezone

distance_calculation.formula: ✓ Uses Haversine formula for great-circle distance
distance_calculation.return_type: ✓ Returns distance in meters (rounded to integer)
distance_calculation.integration: ✓ Only calculated when lat, lng, sort=distance provided

offers_enrichment.enrichment: ✓ Fetches location by location_id, adds location_name and location_image

analytics_tracking.dual_update: ✓ Updates both analytics collection (daily) and locations collection (total)
analytics_tracking.upsert: ✓ Uses upsert for analytics to create/update daily records

business_offers.authorization: ✓ Business users can only create offers for their location

business_menu.authorization: ✓ Business users can only create menu items for their location
